description: Programmatic CAD via .jscad files. Sidebar lists files in the worktree; right pane renders the selected file in 3D.

bin.description: Render a .jscad file to STL via the running server

iframe_commands.name: show
iframe_commands.description: Load a specific .jscad file in the 3D viewer

iframe_commands.name: color
iframe_commands.description: Override model color for subsequent renders (e.g. ff5500). Per-polygon colors from .jscad colorize() are ignored while override is active.

iframe_commands.name: clear-color
iframe_commands.description: Drop the override; restore per-polygon colors from .jscad

iframe_commands.name: refresh
iframe_commands.description: Re-fetch and re-render the current file
